Lyrics.text:
1. Satrohy voninahitra
Anjely masina ô !
Ilay voasatro-tsilo teo
Dia Jeso, Jeso, Jeso
Tompo tokana !
2. Ry afa-pahoriana,
Izay ao an-dapany !
Nombany tao an-dalana,
Ka saotra, laza, hery,
Aoka ho Azy re !
3. Taranaky ny lavo ô,
Izay natsangany
Ekeo Izy eram-po
Ka saotra, laza, hery,
Aoka ho Azy re !
4. Ry firenena marobe
Ambany lanitra
Miankohofa maneke
Fa Jeso, Jeso, Jeso
No Mpanjaka re !
